endpoints.description: Authenticate user and return JWT — prerequisite for all E13 tests

test_cases.name: Login as admin — happy path
Login as staff — happy path
Login as viewer — happy path
Login as manager — happy path

endpoints.description: Update company-level print defaults (ADMIN+ only). Sets default print behaviour for all users in the company.

test_cases.name: Update company defaults — happy path (single document type)

db_verification.query: SELECT value FROM system_settings WHERE company_id = '00000000-0000-4000-a000-000000000001' AND key = 'print.default.SALES_INVOICE'

test_cases.name: Update company defaults — happy path (multiple document types)

db_verification.query: SELECT key, value FROM system_settings WHERE company_id = '00000000-0000-4000-a000-000000000001' AND key LIKE 'print.default.%' ORDER BY key

test_cases.name: Update company defaults — validation error: empty defaults array
Update company defaults — validation error: invalid documentType
Update company defaults — validation error: invalid action
Update company defaults — validation error: missing defaults field
Update company defaults — validation error: missing action in item
Update company defaults — RBAC: STAFF denied (403)
Update company defaults — RBAC: MANAGER denied (403)
Update company defaults — RBAC: VIEWER denied (403)
Update company defaults — no auth token (401)
Update company defaults — idempotent: set same value twice
test_cases.notes: Run twice in sequence — second call should not error. Upsert is idempotent.

endpoints.description: Get company-level print defaults for all 14 document types (STAFF+ read access)

test_cases.name: Get company defaults — happy path (admin)
Get company defaults — happy path (staff can read)
Get company defaults — happy path (manager can read)
Get company defaults — returns all 14 document types with NONE fallback for unset types
test_cases.notes: All 14 document types must appear even if no company defaults are set — those return action=NONE

test_cases.name: Get company defaults — RBAC: VIEWER denied (403)
Get company defaults — no auth token (401)

endpoints.description: Update user-level print preferences for the authenticated user (STAFF+ only)

test_cases.name: Update user preferences — happy path (single preference)

db_verification.query: SELECT document_type, action FROM print_preferences WHERE company_id = '00000000-0000-4000-a000-000000000001' AND user_id = '00000000-0000-4000-a000-000000000010' AND document_type = 'SALES_INVOICE'

test_cases.name: Update user preferences — happy path (multiple preferences)

db_verification.query: SELECT document_type, action FROM print_preferences WHERE company_id = '00000000-0000-4000-a000-000000000001' AND user_id = '00000000-0000-4000-a000-000000000010' ORDER BY document_type
db_verification.expected: PURCHASE_ORDER=BROWSER_PRINT, SALES_INVOICE=AUTO_DOWNLOAD (CREDIT_NOTE=NONE may be normalised to company default)

test_cases.name: Update user preferences — happy path (admin can update own preferences)

db_verification.query: SELECT action FROM print_preferences WHERE company_id = '00000000-0000-4000-a000-000000000001' AND user_id = '00000000-0000-4000-a000-000000000002' AND document_type = 'DELIVERY_NOTE'

test_cases.name: Update user preferences — normalisation: preference matching company default is deleted
test_cases.depends_on: CPD-001 (company default for SALES_INVOICE = AUTO_DOWNLOAD must be set first)

db_verification.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM print_preferences WHERE company_id = '00000000-0000-4000-a000-000000000001' AND user_id = '00000000-0000-4000-a000-000000000010' AND document_type = 'SALES_INVOICE'
db_verification.expected: cnt = 0 (preference was normalised back to company default, so row is deleted)

test_cases.notes: When user sets a preference equal to the company default, the service normalises by deleting the user preference row. The GET response shows source=COMPANY_DEFAULT.

test_cases.name: Update user preferences — validation error: empty preferences array
Update user preferences — validation error: invalid documentType
Update user preferences — validation error: invalid action value
Update user preferences — validation error: missing body
Update user preferences — RBAC: VIEWER denied (403)
Update user preferences — no auth token (401)
Update user preferences — idempotent: update same preference twice

db_verification.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM print_preferences WHERE company_id = '00000000-0000-4000-a000-000000000001' AND user_id = '00000000-0000-4000-a000-000000000010' AND document_type = 'P60'

test_cases.notes: Run this twice — second call should upsert, not create a duplicate.

endpoints.description: Get resolved print preferences for the authenticated user across all 14 document types (STAFF+ only). Resolution: user preference -> company default -> NONE.

test_cases.name: Get user preferences — happy path (staff)
Get user preferences — happy path (admin)
Get user preferences — happy path (manager)
Get user preferences — cascade: user override takes precedence over company default
test_cases.depends_on: CPD-001 (SALES_INVOICE company default = AUTO_DOWNLOAD), UPP-001 (staff user set SALES_INVOICE = AUTO_DOWNLOAD... actually needs a different action to test override)
setup_steps: 1. Set company default: SALES_INVOICE = AUTO_DOWNLOAD (via CPD-001)
2. Set staff user preference: SALES_INVOICE = BROWSER_PRINT (via PUT /system/print-preferences)
test_cases.notes: User preference BROWSER_PRINT overrides company default AUTO_DOWNLOAD. Source should be USER.

test_cases.name: Get user preferences — cascade: company default used when no user preference
test_cases.depends_on: CPD-001 (SALES_INVOICE company default set). Manager has no user preference for SALES_INVOICE.
test_cases.notes: Manager has no user-level preference for SALES_INVOICE, so company default (AUTO_DOWNLOAD) should be used.

test_cases.name: Get user preferences — cascade: FALLBACK to NONE when no user or company preference
test_cases.notes: For any document type with no user preference and no company default, action=NONE and source=FALLBACK.

test_cases.name: Get user preferences — all 14 document types present in response
Get user preferences — RBAC: VIEWER denied (403)
Get user preferences — no auth token (401)

endpoints.description: Reset all user-level print preferences for the authenticated user, reverting to company defaults / NONE fallback (STAFF+ only)

test_cases.name: Reset user preferences — happy path (staff with existing preferences)
test_cases.depends_on: UPP-001 or UPP-002 (staff user must have at least one user preference set)

db_verification.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM print_preferences WHERE company_id = '00000000-0000-4000-a000-000000000001' AND user_id = '00000000-0000-4000-a000-000000000010'

test_cases.name: Reset user preferences — edge case: reset when no user preferences exist (no-op, still 200)

db_verification.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM print_preferences WHERE company_id = '00000000-0000-4000-a000-000000000001' AND user_id = '00000000-0000-4000-a000-000000000010'

test_cases.notes: Resetting when no preferences exist should be a safe no-op, returning the resolved preferences (all COMPANY_DEFAULT or FALLBACK).

test_cases.name: Reset user preferences — happy path (admin)

db_verification.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM print_preferences WHERE company_id = '00000000-0000-4000-a000-000000000001' AND user_id = '00000000-0000-4000-a000-000000000002'

test_cases.name: Reset user preferences — happy path (manager)
Reset user preferences — does not affect other users' preferences
test_cases.depends_on: UPP-003 (admin must have a user preference set beforehand)

db_verification.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM print_preferences WHERE company_id = '00000000-0000-4000-a000-000000000001' AND user_id = '00000000-0000-4000-a000-000000000002'

test_cases.notes: Resetting staff's preferences must not affect admin's preferences.

test_cases.name: Reset user preferences — RBAC: VIEWER denied (403)
Reset user preferences — no auth token (401)

endpoints.description: Generate a single PDF document from a template (STAFF+ only). Returns PDF binary. Used by E13-2 print actions.

test_cases.name: Generate single PDF — happy path (SALES_INVOICE)
test_cases.notes: If recordId doesn't exist in the database, the data loader may return 404 (RECORD_NOT_FOUND). A real recordId from a seeded invoice would yield 200 with PDF binary. This test validates the route is reachable and correctly guarded.

test_cases.name: Generate single PDF — happy path with attachment outputFormat
Generate single PDF — validation error: missing documentType
Generate single PDF — validation error: missing recordId
Generate single PDF — validation error: invalid recordId (not UUID)
Generate single PDF — validation error: invalid documentType
Generate single PDF — validation error: invalid outputFormat
Generate single PDF — RBAC: VIEWER denied (403)
Generate single PDF — no auth token (401)
Generate single PDF — with optional versionContext

expected.notes: Tests that versionContext is accepted by schema without validation error

endpoints.description: Enqueue batch PDF generation via BullMQ (MANAGER+ only). Returns batchJobId. Used by E13-2 batch print.

test_cases.name: Batch generate — happy path
test_cases.notes: Returns 202 Accepted if Redis/BullMQ is available, 503 if not. The batchJobId is a UUID for polling.

test_cases.name: Batch generate — happy path (admin)
Batch generate — validation error: empty recordIds array
Batch generate — validation error: invalid UUID in recordIds
Batch generate — validation error: invalid documentType
Batch generate — validation error: missing recordIds
Batch generate — RBAC: STAFF denied (403)
Batch generate — RBAC: VIEWER denied (403)
Batch generate — no auth token (401)

endpoints.description: Poll batch PDF generation job status (STAFF+ only). Returns progress info.

test_cases.name: Batch status — not found for non-existent batchJobId
test_cases.notes: Returns 404 if batchJobId not found in queue, or 503 if Redis/BullMQ not available.

test_cases.name: Batch status — RBAC: VIEWER denied (403)
Batch status — no auth token (401)
Batch status — validation error: empty batchJobId
test_cases.notes: Empty path param results in route not matching (Fastify 404).

test_execution_order.description: Login all test users to obtain JWT tokens
Set up company-level print defaults (creates SystemSetting rows)
Verify company defaults were persisted correctly
Set user-level print preferences (creates PrintPreference rows)
Verify resolved preferences with cascade logic (user > company > NONE)
Test normalisation, idempotency, and cascade edge cases
Reset user preferences and verify cleanup
All validation error tests (can run in any order)
All RBAC/auth tests (can run in any order)
Document generation endpoints (E12 infrastructure consumed by E13-2)

rbac_coverage.MANAGER: full access to print preferences, denied on company defaults PUT, full access to batch generate
rbac_coverage.STAFF: full access to print preferences (user-level), read access to company defaults, denied on batch generate, full access to single generate
